query:
SELECT o.id, o.order_number, o.order_type, o.outlet_id, o.pickup_outlet, o.instore_outlet, o.created_at 
FROM orders o 
WHERE o.order_number = '00133' OR o.id = 133
ORDER BY o.id DESC LIMIT 5;
